title: henckelia reptans var. monticola
intro: Henckelia reptans var. monticola, also known as the Indian pipe plant or Gentianella alpina, is a species of flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Henckelia reptans var. monticola can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in various parts of the world.
